philosophy.desc_short: Combat is fast, brutal, and decided by position.
philosophy.desc_long: Combat is fast, brutal, and unforgiving. Most fights are decided by position, pressure, and timing — not endurance.

attack_fundamentals.desc_short: Spend an action, choose a target, roll Quality.

damage_resolution.desc_long: Damage reduces Quality by 1 per point. There is no separate health stat.

automatic_damage.desc_short: Automatic damage is not an attack and ignores Defense.
automatic_damage.desc_long: Automatic damage is NOT an attack. It represents environmental or internal harm.

collateral_damage.desc_short: Explosions and terrain effects harm everyone.
collateral_damage.desc_long: Explosions and terrain escalation do not discriminate. Friendly models can be harmed if they are in the area of effect.
